head_commit.message:
Remove log prefix helper macros

The __log_prefixed, __log_prefixed_ratelimited, and __log_prefixed_once
macros are part of the log prefix feature, which belongs in a separate
branch (log-prefix), not in the base logging API.

run.display_title: Replace the log crate with OSTD's own logging API
